supported_auto: continuous / current / exact support only, <= 5 Hz
supported_exact_pending_bench: continuous / field / exact support only, <= 5 Hz (software-ready, bench pending)
supported_finite_exact: finite exact recipe table: sine 47 + triangle 48, <= 5 Hz
provisional preview fallback remains enabled for unsupported finite cells with an approved substitute recipe
preview_only: finite requests outside the exact recipe table
experimental_reference: continuous support above 5 Hz remains reference-only
user_facing.fallback_rule: Unsupported requests stay in preview-only or blocked state and should show the nearest exact recipe within the <= 5 Hz official band when available.
recommended_next_measurements: continuous sine exact grid: 0.75 Hz @ 5/10/20 A
continuous sine exact grid: 1.5 Hz @ 5/10/20 A
continuous sine exact grid: 3.0 Hz @ 5/10/20 A
continuous sine exact grid: 4.0 Hz @ 5/10/20 A

remaining_exact_gap.promotion_target: 96 exact recipes after measured upload arrives.

provisional_preview.promotion_rule: Add a measured exact upload for sine / 1.0 Hz / 1.0 cycle / 20 pp with a non-placeholder file name to retire this preview cell.
